injuries.comment: Gudas did not play in Friday's (Oct. 31) game against Detroit.
The Ducks said on Friday (Oct. 31) that Granlund is expected to be out for 2-3 weeks.
The Devils said on Wednesday (Oct. 15) that Markstrom will miss a couple of weeks.
Brown did not play in Saturday's (Nov. 1) game versus the Kings.
The Devils said Pesce is expected to be out for at least a month, per Amanda Stein of the team's official site.
